exportFontAssets.label: exportFontAssets(global)
exportFontAssets.document: mutation ExportFontAssets($input: ExportFontAssetsInput!) { exportFontAssets(input: $input) { success batchId status errors { code message } } }
exportFontAssets.curl_pp:
curl 'https://nextgen.monotype-pp.com/graph' \
  -H 'accept: application/graphql-response+json,application/json;q=0.9' \
  -H 'authorization: Bearer <BEARER_TOKEN>' \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -H 'origin: https://nextgen.monotype-pp.com' \
  -H 'referer: https://nextgen.monotype-pp.com/manage/usage-activity/fonts' \
  -H 'x-correlation-id: <CORRELATION_UUID>' \
  -X POST \
  --data-raw '{"operationName": "ExportFontAssets", "variables": {"input": {"format": "CSV", "fontId": "<familyOrStyleId>", "fontName": "QA Export Font"}}, "extensions": {"clientLibrary": {"name": "@apollo/client", "version": "4.0.9"}}, "query": "mutation ExportFontAssets($input: ExportFontAssetsInput!) { exportFontAssets(input: $input) { success batchId status errors { code message } } }"}'
